implementation_summary.summary: CP00-855 extends the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only API/UI foundation across RP28.P03.M06.S13-RP28.P04.M03.S20 without executing API runtime, rendering UI runtime, tenant installs, connector loading, custom AI app execution, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, or real client data handling.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-855 RP28.P03.M06.S13-RP28.P04.M03.S20 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP855-P3-01: Non-blocking; expected post-review closeout steps. Resolve by executing the full suite and finalizing adjudication/inspection/receipt prior to commit. CP855-P3-02: Non-blocking; accurate reflection of declared descriptor-only scope. No remediation required. CP00-855 full validation suite is recorded after queue regeneration and before commit; descriptor-only scope remains intentional and runtime-closed.
